checklists.name: Quarterly access review — Q2 2026
checklists.description: Cross-tower attestation that privileged + standing access matches HRMS active set. Anchors to ISO A.5.15 + RBI-7 + NIST PR.AA-05.

items.title: PAM vault — revoke users not in HRMS active set
MFA — re-enroll users who skipped FIDO2 rollout (CyberArk Identity push channel)
PAM break-glass account check-out review
SFTP partner accounts — re-attest external counterparties
Forescout NAC — clean stale device CMDB rows >180d

checklists.name: RBI CSF mid-year compliance verification
checklists.description: RBI Cyber Security Framework attestation against current anchor tools. Evidence package compiled for the CISO sign-off pack.

items.title: Pull RBI-3 anchor-tool evidence (NGFW + SD-WAN + Forescout + Guardicore)
RBI-5 application security — WAF block-mode coverage report (AppTrana + Imperva)
RBI-4 secure configuration — TrendMicro Deep Security policy versions
RBI-9 DLP — Forcepoint outbound-mail policy proof of effectiveness
RBI-10 — FortiAnalyzer retention floor (180d) verification

checklists.name: Endpoint posture verification — May sweep
checklists.description: Confirm endpoint detection, host-IPS, and disk-encryption coverage across the 33,000-endpoint fleet. Surface any drift before the next steering committee.

items.title: S1 — agents offline >24h: investigate + decommission false-positives
TrendMicro Deep Security — agents with policy >7d out of date
Trellix — recovery keys missing from ePO escrow
S1 RFM (Reduced Functionality Mode) endpoints — schedule kernel update

checklists.name: Network segmentation attestation — H1 2026
checklists.description: Attest that segmentation between branch, DC, and DR remains enforced. NGFW HA pair sync, SD-WAN overlay SLAs, Guardicore policy reconciliation.

items.title: FortiGate HA pair sync — confirm both DC pairs in active/passive sync
SD-WAN overlay SLA — review BFD flap report for last 30d
Guardicore — assets with policy_diverged label
Forescout — SNMP creds failures on access switches
FortiManager — failed policy installs in last 14d (close out)

checklists.name: Data protection review — Q2 2026
checklists.description: Cross-tower review of disk encryption, DLP outbound enforcement, and SFTP partner integrity. Maps to ISO A.8.10 / A.8.24 + RBI-9.

items.title: Trellix disk encryption — endpoints with stalled initial encryption >7d
Forcepoint DLP — endpoints with client_uninstalled state
GlobalScape SFTP — partner certs expiring in next 30d
Forcepoint policy load failures — DLP classifier deploy validation

checklists.name: ISO 27001:2022 surveillance audit prep
checklists.description: Pre-audit walk-through of Annex A controls with auditor-curated evidence pulls. Targets the August surveillance window.

items.title: A.5.9 — Asset inventory reconciliation (Forescout + S1 + Trellix)
A.5.15 — Access control evidence package (PAM + MFA)
A.8.7 — Anti-malware coverage report (S1 + TrendMicro)
A.8.23 — WAF block-mode statement (AppTrana + Imperva)
A.8.24 — Cryptography lifecycle review (Trellix encryption + key escrow)

checklists.name: New tool onboarding gate
checklists.description: Checklist run against every newly-added tool before it counts toward coverage. Outputs are the inputs to the SOC sign-off pack.

items.title: Confirm asset denominator + denominatorUnit are accurate vs source-of-truth
Anchor the tool to at least one framework control (ISO / NIST / RBI / CIS / SEBI)
Confirm webhook signing key rotation cadence + HMAC algo documented
Add OEM loss-reason catalog entries (admin console paths + severities)
Confirm freshness SLO matches tower (e.g. Identity 6h, Network 12h)
